uplink.description: Periodic frame: indoor climate + light + occupancy (motion detected), button pressed
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Periodic frame: sub-zero temperature, dark room, no occupancy (motion false), button not pressed
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Periodic frame: light sensor deactivated (1021), noise error (127)/disconnected (126), occupancy disconnected (126) — sentinel fields suppressed, climate retained
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; sentinel lux/noise/occupancy values suppressed per upstream sensor-absent codes

uplink.description: Wrong product byte (0xAC = Wave, not MOVE) returns an error
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (upstream typeOfProduct is undefined for non-MOVE product bytes)
